name: cpig-repmatrix-mesh-tape
description: D7 rep-matrix cell (mesh x tape), R1.3 2026-07-03. Creates a DENSE mesh-derived field (_CPigFromMesh of a MeshSphere r=10; voxel-bakes on export), applies the deterministic solo-perspective camera recipe (decoy-sphere framing, cloned from cpig-booleans), then select + 1x _CPigDisplayRep (cycle reaches 'tape' from the fresh-field 'auto' default), gates on steady+bakes-drained, captures. mode:capture until the operator approves baselines (STOP-POINT R1.3), then flips to pixel-diff. Degrade-by-design cells (dense field asked as tape -> companion stand-in) are kept deliberately: the documented fallback is the behavior to lock. Regenerate: scripts/gen_rep_matrix_tests.py.

setup.vlmDescription: a smooth ray-marched SDF ball derived from a mesh sphere, drawn as a solid, analytically crisp surface. A dense field asked for the tape rep DEGRADES to the companion bounding-sphere stand-in by design — a plain ball here is the EXPECTED, correct fallback. NOT an empty grey viewport.

checkpoints.name: cpig-repmatrix-mesh-tape
checkpoints.description: mesh field rendered with the 'tape' per-field representation.
